app.dropHint: The file will be converted immediately.

toast.updateAvailable: A new update is available ({count} commit(s) behind).

files.title: Files
files.emptyHint: Drop a file anywhere on the window or click "Add a file" to start.
files.dragHint: Drag onto the plan to place an instance
files.duplicate: Place another instance on the plan
files.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}" from the library? Placements on the plan will keep their content.

editModal.title: File settings
editModal.tabShortcut: Press {key} to jump to this tab
editModal.resizeHandle: Drag to resize · double-click to reset
editModal.unsavedWarning: You have unsaved changes. Close anyway?

source.perLayerHint: Pick the rendering style and pen slot for each colour in the Layers tab.

colors.monoHint: Single-ink mode — pick the master style on the Render tab.
colors.noSource: Attach a file on the Source tab to choose colour settings.
colors.notApplicable: This file type doesn't use colour segmentation.

preprocess.intro: Prepare the source image before it's segmented into colour layers.
preprocess.noSource: Attach a file to start adjusting the image.
preprocess.notApplicable: This file type isn't a bitmap — nothing to preprocess.

basic.title: Brightness & colour
basic.gammaHint: Below 1 darkens midtones, above 1 lightens them.

levels.title: Levels
levels.hint: Recentre the tonal range — useful before threshold-based segmentation.

render.multicolorHint: Multicolour rendering is per-layer. Switch to the Layers tab to pick a style for each colour.
render.noSource: Attach a file on the Source tab to choose a render style.
render.notApplicable: This file type doesn't have a render style.
render.replaceOverridesWarning: Switching style will replace {count} per-layer override(s). Continue?

mono.shadesHint: Splits the image into N grey bands; each band carries its own algorithm tuned by the chosen mode.
mono.thresholdHint: Pixels darker than this become the rendered region; lighter pixels are dropped.
mono.detailHint: Higher detail rebuilds the SVG from the image at a larger source canvas — finer features survive (small text, table grids, dense schematics), conversion takes longer.
mono.layersHint: Each band becomes one layer — open the Layers tab to fine-tune any band, swap its algorithm, or stack multi-pass effects.

modes.pencilDesc: Layered cross-hatching at varying angles for a hand-drawn feel.
modes.halftoneDesc: Dot grid; cell size grows with brightness for a tonal print.
modes.stipplingDesc: Scattered dots whose density tracks luminance — portrait-friendly.
modes.engravingDesc: Wavy scanlines with band-dependent spacing — banknote look.
modes.contoursDesc: Nested contour rings, denser for darker bands.
modes.outlineDesc: Pure edge tracing — logos, signs, simple line art.
modes.tspDesc: One continuous nearest-neighbour tour through dark pixels.
modes.spiralDesc: Single Archimedean spiral clipped to the dark region.

editPreview.title: Preview
editPreview.emptyHint: The preview reflects every setting on the right.
editPreview.resetView: Reset view (click) · scroll to zoom · drag to pan
editPreview.livePreviewHint: Reflects every setting change — not yet committed to the plan.
editPreview.savedHint: Last committed conversion — change settings then click Re-convert to refresh.

blockMap.title: Document blocks
blockMap.empty: No blocks detected on this page.
blockMap.hint: Text and image regions detected on the current page.

variants.title: Variants
variants.updateHint: Overwrite the active variant with current settings
variants.hint: Each variant snapshots the layer styles and visibility for this file.
variants.switchHint: Click to switch · double-click to rename

printMode.title: Output (SVG)
printMode.multicolorHint: Split the image into one layer per detected colour.
printMode.monochromeHint: Render the whole image as halftone / stippling in one ink.

palette.title: Palette
palette.followHint: Colours are locked to the pens installed in the machine profile.
palette.noPensInstalled: No pens are marked as installed in the active profile.
palette.manualSwap: {count} of {total} colours have no pen slot — {count} manual swap(s) will be requested during the plot (only {slots} slots available).

printStyles.directDesc: One stroke per region, no fill

execute.runHint: Generate G-code to send it or add it to the queue.

upload.dropHere: Drop a file here or click to browse.
upload.failed: Upload failed. Check the file type and that the API is running.
upload.previewTimeout: Preview too slow for this style. Lower the Detail tier or hit Apply to render anyway.
upload.previewHint: Pick an algorithm to see the preview.

layers.title: Layers
layers.emptyHint: One layer per colour will appear here after you click "Upload & convert" above — pick a plotting style and a pen slot for each.
layers.mergeToOnePenHint: Reassign every layer to pen slot 0 — useful when only one ink is loaded.
layers.fillHint: Optimization converts filled shapes to outline strokes (pens draw lines, not fills).
layers.rerenderUnavailable: Re-rendering is unavailable; re-upload the file to apply the new style.
layers.generateMovedHint: Generate G-code lives in the Plan header — close this dialog and click the green button on the top-right of the preview.
layers.collapseAllHint: Reduce every layer card to its header
layers.expectedHint: Layers this image will produce when you Apply

passes.title: Passes
passes.enableHint: Stack several algorithms on the same colour (e.g. outline + fill).
passes.emptyHint: Add a pass to draw this colour with several stacked algorithms.
passes.badgeHint: Multi-pass — this colour is drawn with several stacked algorithms.
passes.reuploadHint: Re-uploading will reset the {count} multi-pass layer(s) you've configured.
passes.reuploadWarning: Re-uploading will reset {count} multi-pass layer(s). Continue?

confirm.deleteProfileMsg: Delete profile "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
confirm.sendJobMsg: Send the generated G-code to the plotter and start drawing?
confirm.homeMsg: Move the plotter to its home position?

preflight.missingPens: Pen slot(s) {slots} are assigned but not installed; install them or reassign before generating.

sheet.title: Sheet layout
sheet.outOfBounds: The drawing exceeds the workspace; it may be clipped or out of bounds.
sheet.viewHint: Wheel to zoom · drag to pan
sheet.sizeHint: Saved on the machine profile. Existing drawings will be refit.
sheet.exceedsWarning: Sheet exceeds the machine work area.

convert.embeddedImageHint: These options only apply to raster images embedded in the document. Text and vector content are not affected.
convert.specificColorsHint: Optional. Pin exact colors to use; the image will snap to them.
convert.fixedPaletteRefHint: Edit the pinned colours in the Colours block above.
convert.thresholdsHint: N thresholds → N+1 bands sorted by brightness.

profile.title: Machine profile
profile.name: Name
profile.unsavedDraft: Unsaved draft — click Save to persist it.

preview.placeholder: Upload a file to preview it here

simulator.title: Simulator
simulator.manualPenChangeHint: Pause before each layer so you can swap the pen by hand.

plotter.title: Plotter
plotter.commandFailed: Plotter command failed (is a device connected?).

macros.title: Macros
macros.runHint: Connect a plotter (and pause any running job) to run macros.
macros.name: Name

queue.title: Print queue
queue.cancelMsg: Cancel "{name}"? A running job will stop immediately.
queue.loadFailed: Could not load the print queue.
queue.enqueueFailed: Could not add the job to the queue.

system.title: System
system.subtitle: Version info and GitHub self-update.
system.updateHint: Pulls the latest commit, reinstalls dependencies and rebuilds the UI.
system.updateConfirmMsg: Pull the latest code from GitHub and rebuild? Cancel any running job first.
system.needsRestart: Restart the service to load the new Python code.
system.dirtyWarning: Uncommitted local changes detected on this host.
system.forceUpdateHint: Overwrites local changes then updates. Cannot be undone.
system.forceUpdateConfirmMsg: Local changes will be permanently discarded. Continue?
system.forcedNotice: Forced update — local changes were discarded.
system.notifyOnStartup: Notify on startup when an update is available
system.notifyOnStartupHint: Shows a toast on page load when a new commit is available on the remote.

updateModal.statusPulling: Pulling the latest code and rebuilding the UI…
updateModal.noopMessage: No new commits — your install is already current.
updateModal.errorMessage: Something went wrong during the update.
updateModal.doNotClose: Don't close this window — the interface is locked until the operation finishes.
updateModal.forcedNotice: Forced update — local changes were discarded.
updateModal.cacheHint: To load the rebuilt UI, do a hard refresh that bypasses the cache.
updateModal.cacheShortcut: Shortcut: Ctrl + Shift + R (⌘ + Shift + R on Mac)
